project: Preset generique -- illustrations ligne claire franco-belge
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Un pipeline peut sacrifier les flexible mais jamais les critical.

options.wide: full scene visible, environment context, multiple characters, used for group scenes and establishing shots
options.medium: subject with immediate context, balanced framing, expressions readable, used for dialogue and action
options.close: tight framing on face or object, maximum expression detail, used for emotional beats and portraits
options.icon: single object isolated, maximum simplification, used for icons and spot illustrations

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet et avant les style modifiers. Le medium shot est le cadrage naturel de la ligne claire.

style.positioning: Franco-Belgian comic book illustration, clean and readable, flat colors with thick outlines, retro-modern sensibility

linework: thick black outlines as dominant visual element
consistent line weight with minor variation for depth
crisp precise edges, no sketch effect
outlines define every shape boundary clearly
no feathering, no rough hand-drawn instability
color: flat solid colors within outlined areas
limited palette of 4-6 confident tones per scene
colors are bold and readable, never muddy
shading: minimal shading, flat color blocking dominant
optional subtle shadow for ground contact only
no volumetric rendering, no dramatic lighting
no ambient occlusion, no cinematic shadows
shading conveyed through color value shifts not gradients
texture: subtle dot halftone pattern on background or large flat areas
halftone is decorative, not simulating photography
no paper grain, no brush grain, no noise overlays
depth_rules: frontal or three-quarter view by default
mild perspective allowed for architectural scenes
depth conveyed through overlapping shapes and size, not atmospheric perspective

hierarchy: one clear focal subject or action
outlines ensure shape separation at any scale
composition.density: moderate, maximum 5-6 meaningful elements per scene
balance: clear foreground-background separation via line weight
no tangent lines where shapes meet ambiguously

format.default_background: warm off-white (#F5F0E8) with subtle dot halftone pattern

avoid: speech bubbles and text rendered in image
sketch lines and rough unfinished look
prompt_core: Franco-Belgian comic book ligne claire illustration, thick black outlines, flat colors with minimal shading, slightly exaggerated expressions, warm off-white background with subtle dot halftone pattern, clean readable composition, polished editorial quality.
visual_signature: thick black outlines defining every shape
flat bold colors within clean boundaries
subtle dot halftone texture on flat areas

modifiers.usage: Les 5 core modifiers sont injectes apres le sujet. Les optional et enrichment ajoutent une nuance selon le contexte.

characters.design: slightly stylized figures, expressive faces, clear silhouettes defined by thick outlines
characters.anatomy: proportioned but slightly exaggerated, cartoon-influenced realism
characters.expressions: slightly exaggerated for readability: wider eyes, more pronounced brows, expressive mouths
accessories: functional to the narrative, not decorative clutter

types: urban street scenes simplified to essential shapes
interior spaces with clear architectural lines
landscapes reduced to layered flat planes
environment.density: moderate, every element outlined and intentional
rules: every element has a clear black outline
dot halftone fills large empty areas

accents: any 4-6 color harmony with comic book confidence
forbidden: pastel-only palettes (too soft for ligne claire)
contrast_rules: thick outlines ensure separation even with similar colors
preserve strong contrast between foreground elements and background
accent colors used sparingly for narrative focus

invariants: thick black outlines on all elements
warm off-white background with dot halftone
no speech bubbles, no text in image
quality_checks: all shapes have clear black outlines
no accidental gradients or soft edges

negative_short: photorealistic, 3D render, anime style, heavy gradients, painterly brushstrokes, speech bubbles, text in image, neon colors, sketch lines, cluttered background
negative_core: photorealistic, realistic texture, hyperrealism, 3D render, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, heavy gradients, anime style, manga conventions, glossy materials, reflections, metallic surfaces, skin pores, complex texture, visual noise, cluttered background, excessive detail, painterly brushstrokes, watercolor effects, sketch lines, rough outlines, neon colors, oversaturated palette, speech bubbles, text in image, dark muddy colors, overrendered surfaces, depth-heavy perspective, volumetric fog, lens effects, bokeh, film grain, noisy background
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core (33 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

prompt_examples.character: [character description], ligne claire, comic book style, thick black outlines, flat colors, slightly exaggerated expression, [color palette], warm off-white background with subtle dot halftone
prompt_examples.scene: [scene with characters], ligne claire, franco-belgian comic book, thick outlines, flat bold colors, [composition], [color palette], warm off-white (#F5F0E8) background, dot halftone pattern
prompt_examples.urban: [urban setting], ligne claire, thick black outlines, flat colors, architectural precision, [color palette], warm off-white background, subtle halftone, no people or with distant silhouettes
prompt_examples.object: [object description], ligne claire, comic book style, thick black outlines, flat colors, iconic simplification, [colors], warm off-white background with dot halftone
prompt_examples.editorial: [editorial concept], ligne claire, franco-belgian illustration, thick outlines, flat colors, narrative composition, [color palette], warm off-white background, polished editorial quality

prompt_builder.template: [subject], [shot_type], [action or state], ligne claire, franco-belgian comic book, thick black outlines, flat colors, slightly exaggerated expressions, [composition], [color palette], warm off-white (#F5F0E8) background, subtle dot halftone, [optional context]
recommended_order: style core (ligne claire, comic book, thick outlines, flat colors)
prompt_builder.usage_note: Sujet en premier, puis cadrage, puis action, puis contraintes de style. Le prompt_core est injecte en tete pour verrouiller le style ligne claire.

hero_portrait.description: single character portrait, generous negative space, strong outline silhouette
hero_portrait.composition: subject centered or rule-of-thirds, minimum 30% background visible, halftone fills empty space

dialogue_duo.description: two characters facing each other, conversation framing
dialogue_duo.composition: balanced halves, slight overlap or negative space between subjects, both faces readable

street_scene.description: urban or interior environment with optional characters, architectural framing
street_scene.composition: architectural lines guide the eye, characters secondary to environment, layered depth via overlapping shapes

action_panel.description: single dynamic action moment, comic panel energy
action_panel.composition: diagonal energy lines, clear motion direction, exaggerated pose, speed suggested through composition
action_panel.variant: dynamic angle, slight dutch tilt acceptable

spot_illustration.description: small isolated object or vignette, editorial spot art
spot_illustration.composition: single element on halftone background, maximum simplification, icon-like clarity

classic_aventure.description: Tintin-inspired clarity, adventure tone, primary colors, clean environments
classic_aventure.character_style: proportioned figures, round faces, clear eyes, active poses

urban_contemplatif.description: quieter tone, muted palette, urban settings, observational mood
urban_contemplatif.character_style: naturalistic proportions, subtle expressions, contemplative poses

retro_pop.description: bolder colors, more exaggerated expressions, playful energy, vintage feel
retro_pop.character_style: exaggerated features, dynamic poses, high energy silhouettes

editorial_serieux.description: restrained palette, formal compositions, journalistic tone
editorial_serieux.character_style: dignified proportions, measured expressions, formal postures
